description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux ARM that triggers on push events. Use a matrix strategy to build on multiple Linux ARM architectures and distributions, including aarch64 on Ubuntu and Fedora, and armv7 on Arch ARM. For each job, check out the code, determine the current branch name, and use the run-on-arch-action to install dependencies and build a project called mayo using CMake, with architecture-specific installation and test execution steps.
